name: author-speak-before
value: Hi, this is Chris from Verimu. I'll show you how easy it is to get started in about five minutes.

name: slide-display
value:
# Getting started with Verimu

From zero to CRA-compliant in 5 minutes.

name: author-speak-before
value: Step one is installing the CLI. You can run Verimu instantly with n p x, no install required, or install it globally if you prefer.

name: slide-display
value:
## Step 1: Install the CLI

```bash
npx verimu
npm install -g verimu
```

name: author-speak-before
value: Step two is your first scan. Go to any project with a lockfile and run Verimu. It auto-detects your ecosystem, generates a Cyclone D X S B O M, and checks known C V E s.

name: slide-display
value:
## Step 2: Run your first scan

```bash
cd your-project
npx verimu
# Writes ./sbom.cdx.json by default
```

name: author-speak-before
value: Steps three and four are account and API key setup. Create your account on app dot verimu dot com, copy your one-time key, then rerun the scan with the VERIMU_API_KEY environment variable to sync results.

name: slide-display
value:
## Steps 3-4: Account and API key

```bash
# Register
https://app.verimu.com/register

# Connect key and rescan
export VERIMU_API_KEY=vmu_your_key_here
npx verimu
```

name: author-speak-before
value: Step five is C I and C D. Add one GitHub Actions step, set VERIMU_API_KEY as a secret, and optionally gate builds with fail-on high.

name: slide-display
value:
## Step 5: Add to GitHub CI/CD (npm)

```yaml
name: Verimu CRA Scan
on:
  push:
    branches: [main]
  pull_request:

jobs:
  verimu:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: "20"
      - name: Run Verimu scan
        env:
          VERIMU_API_KEY: ${{ secrets.VERIMU_API_KEY }}
        run: |
          if [ ! -f package-lock.json ]; then
            echo "Missing package-lock.json. Run: npm install to generate it."
            exit 2
          fi
          npx verimu scan --fail-on HIGH
```

name: author-speak-before
value: Step six is the dashboard. In app dot verimu dot com, you can monitor vulnerabilities, dependencies, your S B O M archive, and contact alerts. That's it. Your onboarding is complete.

name: slide-display
value:
# You're live with Verimu

- Dashboard: https://app.verimu.com/dashboard
- Docs: https://verimu.com/docs
- Need help? Book a free onboarding call: https://verimu.com/contact
